A heartfelt thank you to the entire Blinkit Team. Today, I witnessed something truly inspiring. A Blinkit ambulance arrived quickly during a medical emergency and provided its service completely free of cost. Seeing such a fast and compassionate response reminded me how important every minute is when someone’s life is at risk.  A heartfelt thank you to the entire Blinkit team for taking this initiative. Providing emergency ambulance services without charging patients is a remarkable step toward making healthcare more accessible and saving lives. Acts like these show that businesses can create a real, positive impact on society.  Thank you, Blinkit, for putting people first. Wishing your team continued success in this life-saving mission.

Pathetic. Very disappointing experience with Blinkit.  Their customer support is one of the worst I’ve dealt with. Instead of resolving genuine issues, they simply reject complaints without providing a satisfactory solution.  Most products are sold at MRP, so there are hardly any meaningful discounts. On top of that, they charge a handling fee, and you often have to place a large order just to qualify for free delivery.  The biggest disappointment is their after-sales service. Even when a defective or damaged product is delivered, getting a return or refund is extremely difficult.  Based on my experience, the convenience is not worth the poor customer service.
